name: Zippy Shrimp Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Cream cheese, softened (3 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
2. Peel and devein the shrimp. Reserve 3 shrimp for garnish; coarsely chop the remaining shrimp. Set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and remaining ingredients. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until blended.
4. Stir in chopped shrimp. Spoon the shrimp mixture into a small serving bowl; cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
5. Garnish with reserved whole shrimp. Serve with assorted crackers.
